problem_solved: Fragmented healthcare data, inefficient clinical trials, and lack of real-world evidence
solution_description: Integrated platform combining clinical trial services, real-world evidence, healthcare data, and analytics. Formed from merger of IMS Health and Quintiles. Largest provider of RWE data globally.
notes: Healthcare data giant. OCE (Omnichannel Customer Engagement) CRM competes with Veeva. Real-world evidence from claims/EHR data. Formerly IMS Health + Quintiles.
